title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TeamLease Skills University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TeamLease Skills University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Curriculum Developer in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
